fact_nuggets.text: Honey Gather (Japanese: Honey Gather) is an Ability introduced in Generation IV. Prior to Generation V, it was the signature Ability of Combee.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D S Improves the chances of finding Nectar in Treasure Boxes. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD When the Pokemon goes to a different floor, it may pick up Nectar! But if it is already holding an item, it won't pick up anything.

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Honey Gather has no effect during battle. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] After winning a battle, any Pokemon in the player's party with Honey Gather that is not already holding an item may collect Honey , similar to Pickup , even if it did not participate in the battle and/or cannot battle . The chance for a Pokemon with this Ability to pick up Honey depends on its level, starting at 5% if the Pokemon is between levels 1 and 10, and going up by 5% every ten levels, ending at a 50% chance at levels 91-100.
In battle [ edit | edit source ] Honey Gather has no effect during battle.
The Pokemon may pick up honey after battle.
